「会員登録不要」がセキュリティリスクを下げる理由: Why "No Registration Required" Can Actually Reduce Security Risk
一般的に会員登録をして使うサービスの方が安全だと思われがちですが、使い捨ての一時: Registered services are generally assumed to be safer, but for one-off, temporary sharing, going registration-free can actually offer greater security benefits.

会員登録をすると、メールアドレスやパスワードなどの個人情報がサービスのサーバーに: When you register, personal details like your email and password are stored on the service's servers. If that service is ever hacked, those details could be exposed — but with a registration-free service, there's nothing stored to begin with.
パスワードの使い回し被害を防ぐ：: Eliminates the risk of password reuse:
多くのユーザーが複数のWebサービスで同じパスワードを使い回しがちです。登録不要: Many people reuse the same password across multiple services. By going registration-free, you avoid the risk of account takeover and the cascade of secondary damage it can cause to your other accounts.

会員用のクラウドストレージは手動で削除しない限りデータが残り続けますが、登録不要: Cloud storage for registered accounts keeps data until you manually delete it, whereas registration-free file transfer services typically auto-delete files from the server after a set period — preventing leaks caused by forgetting to clean up.
